issues.message: Prop "alignY" value "end" is not a known variant for <Inline>.
issues.suggestion: Known values: bottom, top, input, center.

issues.message: Raw <div> used instead of a Marigold component.
issues.suggestion: Raw <div> used instead of a Marigold layout component. Search the Marigold docs for layout alternatives.

issues.message: Inline style on <div> bypasses the design system (maxWidth, margin, padding).
issues.suggestion: Use Marigold layout components (Stack, Columns, Inset, Container) and theme tokens instead of inline styles.

issues.message: Inline style "margin: 0px auto" on <div> (“Merchandise StoreCart: 0Browse our colle”) uses a hardcoded value instead of a design token.
issues.suggestion: Use var(--token-name) or a Marigold component prop instead of hardcoding "0px auto".

issues.message: Flex container children are wrapping to 2 rows (5 children, container 1152px wide, content 1168px wide).
issues.suggestion: Consider using <Columns collapseAt="..."> for responsive multi-column layout, or <Stack> for vertical arrangement.

issues.message: Heading levels should only increase by one (heading-order)
issues.suggestion: Use `<Headline level={N}>` with sequential levels (1, 2, 3…). Do not skip heading levels. Import Headline from `@marigold/components`.

details.html: Classic Logo Tee

issues.message: Document should have one main landmark (landmark-one-main)
issues.suggestion: Wrap your page content in `<AppLayout>` with `<AppLayout.Main>` to provide a `<main>` landmark. Import AppLayout from `@marigold/components`.

issues.message: All page content should be contained by landmarks — 30 elements affected (region)
issues.suggestion: All page content must be inside a landmark region. Use `<AppLayout>` with `<AppLayout.Main>` for the main area, `<TopNavigation>` for the header (`<header>`), and `<Sidebar>` for side navigation (`<aside>`). Import from `@marigold/components`.

issues.message: Interactive element <input> (input) is not reachable via Tab key.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the element is focusable. Marigold interactive components are focusable by default — check if a parent has tabindex="-1" or focus is trapped.
